task_completion.description: Open the legacy_install_guide.docx document in LibreOffice Writer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer is open with the document 'legacy_install_guide.docx' visible in the title bar.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' paragraph style to main titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formatting toolbar or Styles deck shows 'Heading 1' selected when the cursor is on main titles like 'System Requirements', 'Installation Steps', or 'Troubleshooting'.
The formatting toolbar or Styles deck shows 'Heading 2' selected when the cursor is on subtitles like 'Hardware Specifications', 'Database Configuration', etc.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Source Text' character style to code snippets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Character Styles deck shows 'Source Text' highlighted/applied when the cursor is on the code snippets (originally Courier New).

task_completion.description: Apply 'Strong Emphasis' character style to warning text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Character Styles deck shows 'Strong Emphasis' highlighted/applied when the cursor is on the warning text (originally Red).
A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'styled_install_guide.docx' or the LibreOffice Writer title bar displaying 'styled_install_guide.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to perform the formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Writer interface, menus, and Styles deck being interacted with, rather than terminal commands executing a script.

integrity.description: The agent applied actual styles rather than just manually changing font properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Styles deck or formatting toolbar explicitly shows the style names (Heading 1, Heading 2, Source Text, Strong Emphasis) selected, rather than just font name/size/color changes in the toolbar.

integrity.description: The original file was not overwritten.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'Save As' to create the new file, ensuring the original 'legacy_install_guide.docx' remains intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document contains three Heading 1 items: 'System Requirements', 'Installation Steps', 'Troubleshooting'. It contains five Heading 2 items: 'Hardware Specifications', 'Software Dependencies', 'Database Configuration', 'Firewall Settings', 'User Permissions'. Six code snippets (originally Courier New 10pt) should receive the 'Source Text' character style. Three warning messages (originally Red Arial Bold) should receive the 'Strong Emphasis' character style. The target file must be named 'styled_install_guide.docx'.
